function.name: toolSearch
function.description: Fetch the full JSONSchema of deferred tools so they become callable. Deferred tools appear only by name+description in the 'Deferred tools' system reminder; their parameter schema is NOT loaded. Use select:name1,name2 to fetch specific tools, or pass keywords (e.g. 'browser navigate', 'schedule') to rank by name/description match. Once loaded, a tool stays callable for the rest of this Agent turn. The runtime only activates a small batch of matched deferred tools at a time to keep the next LLM request stable, so narrow broad queries and load additional tools in smaller follow-up batches when needed. Do NOT call toolSearch for a tool that is already in the current tools list.

Query.description: Either 'select:name1,name2,...' to fetch exact tools by name, or space-separated keywords to search tool name+description. Prefer select: when the exact tool name is known.

MaxResults.description: Maximum keyword-search matches to return. Ignored for select: queries. Defaults to 5.
